testcase.name: test_login_works

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('token' in {'display_name': 'admin', 'message': 'Login successful', 'permissions': {'can_delete': True, 'can_edit': True, 'can_edit_settings': True, 'can_export': True, ...}, 'role': 'admin', ...} or 'user' in {'display_name': 'admin', 'message': 'Login successful', 'permissions': {'can_delete': True, 'can_edit': True, 'can_edit_settings': True, 'can_export': True, ...}, 'role': 'admin', ...})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_date_format_exports.py:40: in test_login_works assert "token" in data or "user" in data E AssertionError: assert ('token' in {'display_name': 'admin', 'message': 'Login successful', 'permissions': {'can_delete': True, 'can_edit': True, 'can_edit_settings': True, 'can_export': True, ...}, 'role': 'admin', ...} or 'user' in {'display_name': 'admin', 'message': 'Login successful', 'permissions': {'can_delete': True, 'can_edit': True, 'can_edit_settings': True, 'can_export': True, ...}, 'role': 'admin', ...})
